name: active-flow PID liveness check prunes a stack entry whose owning PID no longer exists
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"flow":"alive","pid":99999998}\n{"flow":"dead","pid":99999999}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/active-flow-prune.sh" --pid-liveness-stub alive=true,dead=false 2>err.txt && grep -q 'alive' .claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack && ! grep -q 'dead' .claude-tdd-pro/active-flow.stack && echo ok 1>&2
